# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:20.04

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    postgresql \
    redis-server \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure PostgreSQL
RUN service postgresql start && \
    sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE USER devuser WITH PASSWORD 'devpass';" && \
    sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE devdb OWNER devuser;"

# Configure Redis
COPY redis.conf /etc/redis/redis.conf
RUN chmod 600 /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Copy application files
COPY . /app
WORKDIR /app

# Install Node.js dependencies
RUN npm install

# Expose all necessary ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Start all services
CMD ["./start-services.sh"]
